kw.name: Open chrome browser
kw.doc: Open chrome browser with so many option to customize.

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Call Method
kw.doc: Calls the named method of the given object with the provided arguments.

kw.doc: Calls the named method of the given object with the provided arguments.

kw.name: Get Current Date
kw.doc: Returns current local or UTC time with an optional increment.

kw.name: Join Path
kw.doc: Joins the given path part(s) to the given base path.

kw.name: Create Directory
kw.doc: Creates the specified directory.

kw.name: Wait Until Keyword Succeeds
kw.doc: Runs the specified keyword and retries if it fails.

kw.name: Directory Should Exist
kw.doc: Fails unless the given path points to an existing directory.

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Call Method
kw.doc: Calls the named method of the given object with the provided arguments.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.doc: Calls the named method of the given object with the provided arguments.

kw.doc: Returns current local or UTC time with an optional increment.

kw.doc: Joins the given path part(s) to the given base path.

kw.doc: Creates the specified directory.

kw.doc: Runs the specified keyword and retries if it fails.

kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: Create Webdriver
kw.doc: Creates an instance of Selenium WebDriver.
kw.msg: Creating an instance of the Chrome WebDriver.

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with given arguments and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with given arguments and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Exit For Loop If
kw.doc: Stops executing the enclosing FOR loop if the ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: Search notebook and count data
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with given arguments and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Contains
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` contains ``text``.
kw.msg: Element '//ul[@class="search-item-list"]/li[1]/div[@class="item-detail"]/div[@class="item-info"]/a' did not get text 'macbook' in 5 seconds.

kw.name: Get Text
kw.doc: Returns the text value of the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Convert To Lower Case
kw.doc: Converts string to lower case.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with given arguments and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Get Text
kw.doc: Returns the text value of the element identified by ``locator``.
kw.msg: ${text_result} = โน็ตบุ๊ค 87 รุ่น

kw.name: Get Element Count
kw.doc: Returns the number of elements matching ``locator``.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Create List
kw.doc: Returns a list containing given items.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Scroll Element Into View
kw.doc: Scrolls the element identified by ``locator`` into view.

kw.name: Catenate
kw.doc: Catenates the given items together and returns the resulted string.

kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Catenate
kw.doc: Catenates the given items together and returns the resulted string.

kw.name: Get Text
kw.doc: Returns the text value of the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Append To List
kw.doc: Adds ``values`` to the end of ``list``.

kw.name: Append To List
kw.doc: Adds ``values`` to the end of ``list``.

kw.name: Split String
kw.doc: Splits the ``string`` using ``separator`` as a delimiter string.
kw.msg: ${get_total_show} = ['โน็ตบุ๊ค', '87', 'รุ่น']

kw.name: Convert To Integer
kw.doc: Converts the given item to an integer number.

kw.msg: ${list_name} = ['Apple MacBook Air 15-MC9L4TH/A', 'Apple MacBook Air 15-MC9K4TH/A', 'Apple MacBook Air 15-MC9J4TH/A', 'Apple MacBook Air 15-MC9H4TH/A', 'Apple MacBook Air 15-MC9G4TH/A', 'Apple MacBook Air 15-MC9F4TH...

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with given arguments and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Should Be Equal
kw.doc: Fails if the given objects are unequal.
